epic.title: EVA UI Testing Bench
epic.description: Standalone accessibility and component testing harness for all EVA UI products. Packages: jest, jest-axe (@testing-library/react). Decoupled from individual product repos — results feed 31-eva-faces and future EVA-JP frontends. WCAG 2.1 AA gate.

features.title: Accessibility Testing Suite — jest-axe
features.description: Automated WCAG 2.1 AA testing via jest-axe for all EVA UI components. Zero violation gate. Runs on every PR for 31-eva-faces.

features.title: Component Regression Suite — React Testing Library
features.description: @testing-library/react snapshot and interaction tests for EVA shared components. Catches regressions when @eva/ui or GC Design System components are updated.

user_stories.title: [UIB-WI-0] UI bench setup — jest, jest-axe, @testing-library/react configured
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: npm test runs successfully. jest.config.js present. At least one axe smoke test passes. package.json name: eva-ui-bench.

user_stories.title: [UIB-WI-1] Accessibility baseline — all 31-eva-faces admin screens pass jest-axe (0 violations)
user_stories.acceptance_criteria: All 24 admin screen components tested via jest-axe. 0 violations on PR gate. Results reported as GitHub annotation on failing PRs.

evidence.notes: Depends on FACES-WI-0 and full admin screen component library in 31-eva-faces.
